falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 swing low equivalent would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held at 5119 and this pattern requires higher lows to maintain structural similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak at 23.39; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation beyond the referenced pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottom formation but rather a deeper liquidation event

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.75% while SPX is below 5200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than a growth-scare bottom, as the August 2024 bottom featured yields stable/rising with equities; concurrent collapse in yields and stocks invalidates the 'soft landing' bottom thesis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
